creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
The build of tkdesk port is broken due to update of
	  lang/itcl
	and perhaps
	  x11-toolkits/blt
	which both based on tk/tcl 8.3

	I manage to fix this problem, but than tkdesk wasn't usable
	cause the mix out of tcl/tk 8,2 which tkdesk is written for
	and the 8.3 versions conflicts when trying to start tkdesk.

	With tcl/tk 8.3 also activated for tkdesk it builds, but
	at the initialisation phase there are also several errors.

Fix: 

Sorry, don't know. I think reaktivating itcl3.0 is an issue.
	On the tkdesk homepage I found no patch for this problem.

Best regards

Lars
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to build the tkdesk port.
